title: poa litorosa
intro: Poa litorosa, also known as beach meadow-grass or coastal meadow-grass, is a species of grass that is native to New Zealand and is often found in coastal areas. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Poa litorosa include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Poa litorosa can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
